rules.name: Well Disciplined
rules.fullDesc: Models may reroll 1s To Hit. Auras that allow reroll 1s To Hit allow all failed To Hit rolls of 1 or 2 to be rerolled instead.

rules.name: Justified
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army gain Ld+1.

rules.name: Righteous Zeal
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army may reroll 1s To Wound in Melee on the phase they successfully Charged.

rules.name: Black Rage
rules.fullDesc: If a unit ever fails its Ld test, they suffer WS+1, BS+1 (One worse) and gain A+1 for the remainder of the game. Units suffering from the Black Rage must declare Charges if within Range, and cannot fire weapons or Advance if it would make declaring a Charge within range illegal. If a Charge cannot be declared, the unit must move towards the closest enemy unit and Advance if it still cannot Charge or Shoot them.

rules.name: Quicksilver Blood
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army gain I+1.

rules.name: Unnatural Speed
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army gain Counterattack.

rules.name: Relic Seekers
rules.fullDesc: Any Objective Marker that scores Victory Points for the enemy while your army has a scoreable unit within 3" awards you .5 Victory Points as well.

rules.name: Unknown Origins
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army suffer Ld-1.

rules.name: Hold the Line
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army may reroll failed Sv rolls of 1.

rules.name: Unwavering
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army may reroll failed Ld Tests.

rules.name: Foreboding Knowledge
rules.fullDesc: All Characters and Independent Characters suffer Ld-1.

rules.name: Watchers
rules.fullDesc: Any Character or Independent Character may take a Watcher Token. Any unit the Independent Character is in (or themselves) may reroll any one die per Phase.

rules.name: Extreme Trials
rules.fullDesc: You may treat Scouts, Bladeguard Veterans, Company Veterans, Sternguard Veterans, and Vanguard Veterans as Troop Slots.

rules.name: Long Suffering
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army gain Ld+1.

rules.name: Monster Hunters
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army gain +1 To Wound Monstrous Infantry, Monsters, or Titanic Monsters in Melee.

rules.name: Trophy Hunters
rules.fullDesc: No models in your army may claim Objective Markers.

rules.name: Savages
rules.fullDesc: All models in this army have Furious Charge.

rules.name: Aggressive Tactics
rules.fullDesc: All models in this army add +2" to Charges.

rules.name: Extensive Rituals
rules.fullDesc: This army will always lose Initiative Rolls for who decides Attacking and Defending Players.

rules.name: Spiritual Resolve
rules.fullDesc: All units in this army may Deny the Witch at Psychic Master Level 1, or +1 If they already have Psychic Mastery.

rules.name: Rip and Tear
rules.fullDesc: All Melee attacks made by your army are considered Rending. Rending weapons trigger on a 4+ instead of 5+ If a 4+ would still be successful.

rules.name: Eager Warmongers
rules.fullDesc: All units in your army may reroll failed Charges.

rules.name: Imperial Fist Bolter Drill
rules.fullDesc: All models are always considered as sitting still for purposes of Bolter Discipline.

rules.name: Shore up the Defenses
rules.fullDesc: Buildings Embarked by Imperial Fist units gain T+1 while they are inside.

rules.name: Deadly Efficiency
rules.fullDesc: You may treat Devastator Squads and Dreadnoughts (no variants or specialized versions) as Troop Slots or their respective Slots.

rules.name: Heavy Fire Doctrines
rules.fullDesc: All models Snapshot on a 5+ with Heavy weapons, including Overwatch, instead of the usual 6+.

rules.name: Protect Civilians
rules.fullDesc: Your army may only score VP based on Objectives requiring Objective Markers to be held.

rules.name: Protect What is Already Possessed
rules.fullDesc: Gain +1 VP per completed Objective for Objectives 11-36 once per Turn.

rules.name: The Martial Bond
rules.fullDesc: All Ranged and Melee Attacks from this army have the Gauss Rule.

rules.name: Ultima Founding
rules.fullDesc: This army may only include models with the Stubborn rule.

rules.name: Strike from the Shadows
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army gain Stealth. If they already had Stealth, they swap Stealth for Shroud instead.

rules.name: Aggressive Nature
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army gain Furious Charge.

rules.name: Wolfen Fury
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army gain A+1 on the turn they Charge.

rules.name: The Pursuit of Knowledge
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army gain Ld+4 when within 3" of an Objective.

rules.name: Knowledge Absolute
rules.fullDesc: Gain 2 VP for Kingslayer instead of D3.

rules.name: Emperor's Finest
rules.fullDesc: You may reroll one Objective during your Command Phase, even if it has already been rerolled.

rules.name: Guardians of the Cadian Gate
rules.fullDesc: All infantry models in your army gain Objective Secured and Stubborn when within 3" of an Objective Marker.

rules.name: Speed Tactics
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army gain Hit and Run.

rules.name: Rapid Deployment
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army gain Scout.

rules.name: Bleeding the Prey
rules.fullDesc: If the target of Charge is at half or less of the combined unit's total Wounds from Deployment, the Charge automatically succeeds if it is within 12".

rules.name: Ultima Founding
rules.fullDesc: This army may only include models with the Stubborn rule.

commonWargearRef.name: Augar Array
commonWargearRef.desc: 6" Aura, target unit does not scatter when Deepstriking. This Aura is cast when the first model is placed prior to scattering.

commonWargearRef.name: Chaff Launchers
commonWargearRef.desc: This model has a 5+ Invulnerability Save against Ranged Attacks.

commonWargearRef.name: Dozerblade
commonWargearRef.desc: Reroll Dangerous Terrain Tests and failed Moved through Cover.

commonWargearRef.name: Extra Armour
commonWargearRef.desc: You may treat all Crew Stun Results as Weapon Disabled.

commonWargearRef.name: Iron Halo
commonWargearRef.desc: This model has a 4+ Invulnerability Save.

commonWargearRef.name: Recovery Gear
commonWargearRef.desc: Roll a D6, on 5+ repair Immobilized or Crew Stun result.

commonWargearRef.name: Refractor Field
commonWargearRef.desc: This model has a 5+ Invulnerability Save.

commonWargearRef.name: Rosarius
commonWargearRef.desc: This model has a 4+ Invulnerability Save.

commonWargearRef.name: Smoke Launchers
commonWargearRef.desc: 6" range, place a 5" Smoke Cloud that causes -1 To Hit and scatters to move an extra +1" until your Command Phase. One Use Only. Use in your Shooting Phase only.

commonWargearRef.name: Standard
commonWargearRef.desc: This inspiring battle flag grants the following auras: 6" Aura — this model and target unit may reroll failed Ld Tests; 6" Aura — this model and target unit gain A+1.

commonWargearRef.name: Storm Shield
commonWargearRef.desc: This model gains Sv-1 (improves by 1) and a 4+ Invulnerability Save.

commonWargearRef.name: Terminator Honours
commonWargearRef.desc: This model gains a 5+ Invulnerability Save.

armyRules.name: Adjusted Tactics
armyRules.fullDesc: During Deployment, after you have seen the Army Roster your opponent is bringing, this model may swap its current weapon(s) for legal weapon options equal to or less than the current point costs. For example, a Tactical Marine may swap its Plasma Gun for a Flamer because it costs less points.

armyRules.name: Bolter Discipline
armyRules.fullDesc: This model always counts as being in half range when firing Rapid Fire weapons that have Bolter as long as it did not Move or does not count as Moving during your Movement Phase.

armyRules.name: Know No Fear
armyRules.fullDesc: This unit automatically passes Pinning Tests, Rally Tests, and Fear Tests. They still will fall back if they lose Combat Resolution.

armyRules.name: Tactical Squads
armyRules.fullDesc: Each unit with this rule may declare they are forming their own units during your Command Phase. They may split up as low as two models per unit. Units must be placed within Unit Coherency during Deployment. They may instead merge back into bigger units but may not exceed maximum unit size or merge with units other than their own unit name. If they do so, all suffered Wounds stack onto the most wounded models in the form of Mortal Wounds. If there are more to stack then remaining Wounds on a model, nominate another model to suffer these remaining Mortal Wounds. Independent Characters can never pass on Wounds or take on Wounds for a unit in this fashion.

armyRules.name: Transhuman Physiology
armyRules.fullDesc: This model has a 5+ Feel No Pain.

armyRules.name: Night Vision
armyRules.fullDesc: This model ignores all penalties from Night Fighting rules.

armyRules.name: Battle Drills
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may Reroll 1s To Hit.

armyRules.name: The Hour is Nigh
armyRules.fullDesc: When the weapon is fired, place a marker on field at a valid target. In your next Command Phase, the barrage strikes! Scatter like normal, following the 15" Blast radius rules.

armyRules.name: T Minus 5
armyRules.fullDesc: The weapon may not be fired Turn 1. If the weapon is marked on the field and the carrier is destroyed, the Orbital Strike still hits in your Command Phase.

armyRules.name: Canticle of Hate
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit treat Rapid Fire # weapons as Assault # weapons.

armyRules.name: Zealot
armyRules.fullDesc: This model may reroll all failed To Hit rolls on the Phase it Charged or was Charged.

armyRules.name: Tactical Authority
armyRules.fullDesc: 18" Aura, this model and target unit gains Counterattack.

armyRules.name: Targeting Skulls
armyRules.fullDesc: 12" Aura, this model and target Unit may Overwatch at full BS instead of the usual Snapshots. Templates still perform Snapshots for number of dice but use BS To Hit.

armyRules.name: Repair Servo Skulls
armyRules.fullDesc: Repair 1 Wound on Target Vehicle within 12". Roll a d6, on a 5+, restore a Weapon Disabled, Destroyed, Crew Stun, or Immobilize secondary result.

armyRules.name: Apothecary
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain 5+ Feel No Pain.

armyRules.name: Chief Apothecary
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura – This model and target unit may reroll 1s for Feel No Pain.

armyRules.name: Awaken the Machine
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target Vehicle unit gains BS-1 (Improves by 1).

armyRules.name: Servo Arm
armyRules.fullDesc: Gain +1 To Repair rolls.

armyRules.name: Lobotomized
armyRules.fullDesc: 5+ Feel No Pain.

armyRules.name: Glory Hunter
armyRules.fullDesc: This model may choose the target of its Challenge. The target may not deny the Challenge.

armyRules.name: Blade Parry
armyRules.fullDesc: This model has a 4+ Invulnerability Save against Melee attacks.

armyRules.name: Chaplain Bodyguard
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target unit suffers from Slow.

armyRules.name: Hand to Hand Drills
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may Reroll 1s To Wound.

armyRules.name: Drop Pod
armyRules.fullDesc: This model acts like a Titanic unit when arriving by Deepstrike for displacing models and causing Auto Hits.

armyRules.name: Weapons Platform
armyRules.fullDesc: This model counts as not moving for the purpose of Shooting.

armyRules.name: Devastating Charge
armyRules.fullDesc: This model gains A+1 on the Phase it counts as Charging.

armyRules.name: Terror Troops
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target unit suffers Ld-2. This is cast as a Unit and not per model.

armyRules.name: Blazing Weapons
armyRules.fullDesc: This model may Shoot before or after Advancing and performs Overwatch on its BS instead of Snap Shots.

armyRules.name: Mysterious Protection
armyRules.fullDesc: This model has a 4+ Invulnerability Save.

armyRules.name: Advanced Scanners
armyRules.fullDesc: This model ignores Cover Saves when making Ranged Attacks.

armyRules.name: Grapnel Launcher
armyRules.fullDesc: This model ignores Models and Terrain when Moving, Advancing, Charging, and Falling Back.

armyRules.name: Unyielding Specters
armyRules.fullDesc: This model has a 4+ Invulnerability Save.

armyRules.name: Ceramite Bulk
armyRules.fullDesc: This model may not be transported by Transports.

armyRules.name: Fortification
armyRules.fullDesc: This model may never be moved once placed on the Table, except when it is destroyed.

armyRules.name: Chapter Ancient
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may make an Immediate Free Shooting Phase against any unit that just arrived from Reserves that is in range.

armyRules.name: Chapter Champion
armyRules.fullDesc: This model may reroll all failed To Hit and To Wound rolls.

terminator-armour.label: Terminator Armour
terminator-armour.note: M-2, W+1, 5+ Invulnerability Save. Gain: Monstrous Infantry, Very Bulky, Deepstrike, Steady. Lose: Infantry, Objective Secured, Grenades, Bolt gun, Bolt pistol. Gain Stormbolter.

bike.label: Bike
bike.note: M+6, T+1, W+1. Gain Steed. Gain a Stormbolter.

chapter-master.label: Chapter Master
chapter-master.note: W+1, A+1. Gain Orbital Strike. Gain Unique.

chief-librarian.label: Chief Librarian
chief-librarian.note: W+1, A+1. Gain Psychic Mastery +1. May Deny the Witch twice per Psychic Phase. Gain Unique.

chief-chaplain.label: Chief Chaplain
chief-chaplain.note: W+1, A+1. May take one additional H option. Gain Unique.

chief-apothecary.label: Chief Apothecary
chief-apothecary.note: W+1, A+1. 6" Aura – This model and target unit may reroll 1s for Feel No Pain. Gain Unique.

master-of-the-forge.label: Master of the Forge
master-of-the-forge.note: W+1, A+1. Gain Repair D3 Wounds. May use both versions of Repair on the same target. Gain Unique.

chapter-ancient.label: Chapter Ancient
chapter-ancient.note: W+1, A+1. 6" Aura – this model and target unit may make an Immediate Free Shooting Phase against any unit that just arrived from Reserves that is in range. Gain Unique.

chapter-champion.label: Chapter Champion
chapter-champion.note: W+1, I+1, A+1. Reroll all failed To Hit and To Wound rolls. Gain Unique.

primaris-terminator-armour.label: Terminator Armour
primaris-terminator-armour.note: M-2, W+1. Gain Monstrous Infantry, Deepstrike, Steady, Very Bulky. Lose Grenades.

librarius.name: Cause Misfortune
librarius.description: Target unit gains Rending on all Ranged and Melee Attacks until your next Psychic Phase.

librarius.name: Forewarning
librarius.description: Target unit gains 4+ Cover Save until your next Psychic Phase.

librarius.name: Bolster
librarius.description: Target unit counts as having not Moved for the purposes of Shooting until your next Psychic Phase.

librarius.name: Enfeeble
librarius.description: Target unit suffers T-1 until your next Psychic Phase.

librarius.name: Endurance
librarius.description: Target unit gains T+1 until your next Psychic Phase.

inlineRules.fullDesc: When fired, place a marker at a valid target. In your next Command Phase the missile strikes, scattering normally with 15" Blast radius rules.

inlineRules.name: T Minus 5
inlineRules.fullDesc: The weapon may not be fired Turn 1. Cannot be destroyed or Disabled. If the carrier is destroyed the missile still hits.

inlineRules.name: Drop Pod
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model acts like a Titanic unit when arriving by Deepstrike for displacing models and causing Auto Hits.

inlineRules.name: Heavy Gate
inlineRules.fullDesc: In your Command Phase you may declare if the Gate is Open or Closed. Models may not move through the Gate when it is Closed. The Gate cannot be Closed if models are Obstructing the Gate.

inlineRules.name: Gun Emplacement
inlineRules.fullDesc: This Fortification does not replace an existing piece of Terrain in your Deployment Zone like normal, it is placed with the Terrain instead.

inlineRules.name: Shield Generator
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model (and any models on top of this Terrain Feature) and target unit gain 5+ Invulnerability Save.
